howItWorks.intro: This gold investment return calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: Is gold a good investment?
faq.answer: Gold has historically served as a hedge against inflation and currency devaluation. Over the long term, gold has averaged 7-10% annual returns, though it can be volatile in shorter periods.

faq.question: How has gold performed recently?
faq.answer: Gold has risen significantly from around $1,800/oz in 2022 to over $2,300/oz in 2024, driven by inflation concerns and central bank buying.
